features.description: Consolidate open dependency and CI pull request changes into the master line
steps: Inspect open PR branches and determine the consolidated change set
Integrate selected dependency and workflow updates into the repo
Generate a backend lockfile and resolve install compatibility issues
Validate via npm ci, lint, tests, and smoke checks
Commit and push the consolidated branch

features.description: Triage duplicate Linear issue DTS-1695 for MongoDB Atlas billing alert and prepare a resolver prompt for the canonical issue
steps: Review the Linear status-change trigger payload
Check available MCP resources and repository integration context
Research current MongoDB Atlas billing alert documentation
Document root-cause assessment and resolver prompt template
Verify, commit, and push the branch
